heading: Clothing
label: 7562 Clothing
text: The President may prescribe the quantity and kind of clothing to be issued annually to members of the Army.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)456210:831.R.S. 1296 (less 1st 9 words).The words “members of the Army” are substituted for the words “troops of the United States”.
